childhood.familyBackground: Duff comes from a business-oriented family with diverse holdings in several industries. His parents were entrepreneurs who encouraged risk-taking and innovation.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 더프는 여러 산업에 다양한 지분을 가진 사업 지향적 가족 출신이다.
childhood.education: Georgia Institute of Technology; Stanford Graduate School of Business
childhood.earlyLife: Duff invested in various industries including manufacturing, real estate, and technology. His diversified approach helped him weather economic downturns.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 더프는 제조, 부동산 및 기술을 포함한 다양한 산업에 투자했다. 그의 다각화된 접근 방식은 경제 침체를 견딜 수 있게 도왔다.

careerTimeline.event: Started investing in manufacturing and real estate sectors
careerTimeline.eventKo: 제조 및 부동산 부문에 투자 시작

careerTimeline.event: Diversified portfolio expanded into technology and energy sectors
careerTimeline.eventKo: 포트폴리오를 기술 및 에너지 부문으로 다각화

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through diversified holdings
careerTimeline.eventKo: 다양한 지주를 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Real estate investment in commercial properties suffered from market downturn
failures.descriptionKo: 상업용 부동산 투자가 시장 침체로 인해 악영향을 받음
failures.lesson: Real estate cycles must be understood and respected in investment strategy
failures.lessonKo: 투자 전략에서 부동산 사이클을 이해하고 존중해야 한다

quotes.text: Diversification is the key to surviving economic cycles

recommended.title: The Intelligent Investor
recommended.author: Benjamin Graham
recommended.note: Shaped his conservative approach to diversified investing
recommended.noteKo: 보수적인 다각화 투자 접근 방식을 형성함

personalTraits.knownFor: Diversified portfolio management; manufacturing and real estate expertise
personalTraits.knownForKo: 다양한 포트폴리오 관리; 제조 및 부동산 전문성
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and workforce development programs
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 교육 및 인력 개발 프로그램 지원
